name: What's the first step after hurting my knee falling at work in Saint George?
description: Report in writing to employer now, then seek medical care—180-day Utah deadline.[1]

mainEntity.name: What's the first step after hurting my knee falling at work in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report in writing to employer now, then seek medical care—180-day Utah deadline.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Immediately report the injury to your supervisor or HR in writing.** Utah requires this within 180 days to qualify for benefits; employers file Form 122 within 7 days.[1][3] Key factors: Get medical treatment and tell the doctor it's work-related; request Forms 122 and 100; avoid insurer statements alone. Follow up with a claim filing for protections like medical coverage. Quick action prevents denials.
